name: Mashed Potato Casserole/grandpa's
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir together cream cheese, garlic salt, pepper, and sour cream; set aside.
2. Prepare and boil quartered potatoes; drain.
3. Using an electric mixer or a potato masher, beat the hot potatoes until they are in fine lumps.
4. Add the sour cream mixture and continue beating until smooth.
5. Spoon the potatoes into a well-buttered 2-quart casserole.
6. Dot with butter and sprinkle with paprika.
7. If made ahead, cover and refrigerate until the next day.
8. Bake, covered, in a 400°F oven for 25 minutes (50 minutes if refrigerated).
9. Uncover and bake for an additional 10 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
10. Garnish with parsley sprigs, if desired. Makes 6 servings.
